problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Autophagy. Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
